repos.name: reporium-security
repos.description: Automated security scanning for the Reporium suite — grades every public repo A through F nightly
repos.readmeSummary: Reporium Security is an automated security scanning tool that evaluates public repositories in the Reporium suite on a nightly basis. It assigns security grades from A through F to help developers identify and address potential vulnerabilities in their codebases.

repos.name: perditio-devkit
repos.description: Shared tooling for Perditio projects — badges, GitHub client, file utilities
repos.readmeSummary: This repository provides shared tooling and utilities for Perditio projects, including functionality for badges, GitHub client operations, and file utilities. It serves as a centralized development kit to standardize common operations across multiple Perditio projects.

repos.name: reporium-scoring
repos.description: Score any GitHub repo 0-100 for the Reporium platform — README quality, activity, community health, CI/CD
repos.readmeSummary: Reporium-scoring is a Python tool that evaluates GitHub repositories with a comprehensive scoring system from 0-100 points. It analyzes multiple dimensions including README quality, repository activity, community health metrics, and CI/CD implementation to provide an overall assessment for the Reporium platform.

repos.name: reporium-audit
repos.description: Nightly automated audit of the entire Reporium platform — verified health checks
repos.readmeSummary: This repository contains automated nightly audit scripts for the Reporium platform that perform comprehensive health checks and verification processes. It runs scheduled monitoring and validation tasks to ensure the platform's integrity and operational status across all components.

repos.name: reporium-events
repos.description: Event schema definitions and Python publisher client for Reporium platform — GCP Pub/Sub
repos.readmeSummary: This repository contains event schema definitions and a Python publisher client for the Reporium platform, utilizing Google Cloud Platform Pub/Sub for event messaging. It provides standardized event schemas and tools for publishing events within the Reporium ecosystem.

repos.name: reporium-system-design
repos.description: Architecture decisions, tradeoffs, CAP theorem analysis, and diagrams for the Reporium platform
repos.readmeSummary: This repository contains system design documentation for the Reporium platform, including architecture decisions, tradeoffs analysis, and CAP theorem considerations. It provides comprehensive diagrams and documentation to guide the technical implementation and scaling decisions for the platform.

repos.name: repo-intelligence
repos.description: Score any GitHub repo 0-100 — README, activity, community, CI. Pip-installable.
repos.readmeSummary: A Python tool that automatically scores GitHub repositories on a 0-100 scale based on multiple criteria including README quality, activity levels, community engagement, and CI/CD setup. It's designed for developers and organizations who need to quickly assess repository quality and maintainability.

repos.name: reporium
repos.description: Your GitHub repos as a living AI-native knowledge graph library tool - an AI trend intelligence system that speaks to the people who need to understand what developers are building. Your curation, your lens, your industry perspective. Insights compounds, getting smarter every day.
repos.readmeSummary: Reporium is an AI-native knowledge graph tool that transforms GitHub repositories into an intelligent library system for tracking development trends. It provides AI-powered insights and curation capabilities to help users understand what developers are building across their repositories.

repos.name: portfolio
repos.description: Portfolio of AI discovery tools, developer tooling, and automation systems built by Kim Loza
repos.readmeSummary: A portfolio repository showcasing AI discovery tools, developer utilities, and automation systems created by Kim Loza. Contains various Python-based tools and demonstrations of AI development capabilities for developers and potential collaborators.

repos.name: reporium-ingestion
repos.description: Local data ingestion and analysis scripts for Reporium : fetch, process, and generate embeddings for repositories, communicating with Reporium API. AI-native analysis, embeddings, scraping, tagging. Pushes updates to API. Standalone and private by default.
repos.readmeSummary: A Python tool that automatically fetches repository data, processes it, and generates AI embeddings for analysis. It connects with the Reporium API to provide intelligent tagging and insights about code repositories using machine learning models.

repos.name: forksync
repos.description: Tooling ⚙️: Keep your GitHub forks updated automatically. Runs nightly.
repos.readmeSummary: ForkSync is an automated tool that keeps GitHub repository forks synchronized with their upstream repositories by running nightly updates. It helps developers maintain current forks without manual intervention using a web service built with FastAPI and cloud storage.

repos.name: reporium-api
repos.description: Backend API for Reporium : read/write access to repository database, designed for public queries and private ingestion updates. Gatekeeper API that talks to the database, handles authorized writes, serves data to clients/frontends. Public-facing, but writes are only authorized.
repos.readmeSummary: Backend API service for Reporium that provides read/write access to a repository database. It serves as a gatekeeper API handling authorized database writes and serving data to client applications and frontends.

repos.name: reporium-db
repos.description: Nightly GitHub metadata sync — powers reporium.com. Supports 100K repos via GraphQL tiers, checkpointing, and partitioned output.
repos.readmeSummary: A Python tool that performs nightly synchronization of GitHub repository metadata to power reporium.com. It supports up to 100K repositories using GraphQL API tiers with features like checkpointing and partitioned output for efficient data processing.

repos.name: reporium-metrics
repos.description: Platform performance tracking over time — ASCII trend charts, nightly collection.
repos.readmeSummary: Reporium-metrics is a platform performance tracking tool that generates ASCII trend charts and collects metrics on a nightly schedule. It appears to be used by developers and platform operators who need to monitor system performance over time using simple text-based visualizations.

repos.name: reporium-roadmap
repos.description: Public product roadmap for reporium.com — auto-updated nightly with live GitHub stats.
repos.readmeSummary: This repository contains the public product roadmap for reporium.com, a service that automatically updates project roadmaps with live GitHub statistics on a nightly basis. It serves as a transparent way for users to track development progress and priorities for the reporium platform.

repos.name: reporium-dataset
repos.description: Public dataset mirror for reporium.com — nightly-updated AI dev tool stats from reporium-db.
repos.readmeSummary: A public dataset mirror that provides nightly-updated statistics and information about AI development tools from the reporium.com database. It serves as a data source for researchers, developers, and analysts who need access to comprehensive AI tooling metrics and trends.

categories.description: Repos related to data science & analytics
